extendedTextMessage.text:
📋 *Mass Group Creator*

Please send the *VCF (contacts) file* now.

_What I will do:_
• ✅ Keep only numbers registered on WhatsApp
• ❌ Discard numbers not on WhatsApp
• ⏭️ Skip contacts that fail to add
• 👥 Create groups of up to 1000 members each
• 🔄 Auto-create the next group when limit is reached

_Supports large contact lists (30 000+)._
_⏳ Session expires in 10 minutes._

📋 *Mass Group Creator*

📝 Group name prefix: *Mass Group*
Groups will be named: *Mass Group1*, *Mass Group2*, ...

Now please send the *VCF (contacts) file*.

_What I will do:_
• ✅ Keep only numbers registered on WhatsApp
• ❌ Discard numbers not on WhatsApp
• ⏭️ Skip contacts that fail to add
• 👥 Create groups of up to 1000 members each
• 🔄 Auto-create the next group when limit is reached

_Supports large contact lists (30 000+)._
_⏳ Session expires in 10 minutes._

imageMessage.accessibilityLabel:
If your follower count looking funny today, you might not be alone. Reports claim Instagram is carrying out a major bot purge aimed at removing fake, spam, inactive, and inauthentic accounts from the platform.

Several high profile pages and influencers are reportedly seeing major drops in followers, similar to previous cleanups that impacted celebs and large creators in the past.

 While some users are panicking over the numbers, others say the purge could actually help engagement by clearing out fake activity. Sticker: Photo selected
